data.name: Paris Saint Germain vs Arsenal
data.result_info: Paris Saint Germain won after penalties.

comments.comment: The first half begins.
Leandro Trossard from Arsenal won a free kick on the left wing.
Achraf Hakimi of Paris Saint Germain commits a foul.
Fabián Ruiz from Paris Saint Germain committed a foul.
Bukayo Saka from Arsenal won a free kick in defense.
Goal! Arsenal takes the lead 1-0 against Paris Saint Germain. Kai Havertz scores with a left-footed shot from a difficult position on the left into the top left corner, assisted by Leandro Trossard.
Myles Lewis-Skelly of Arsenal won a free kick in defense.
Khvicha Kvaratskhelia fouled a player from Paris Saint Germain.
Ousmane Dembélé of Paris Saint Germain won a free kick on the left wing.

Corner awarded to Paris Saint Germain after Gabriel Magalhães concedes.
Fabián Ruiz from Paris Saint Germain missed a chance, shooting with his left foot from the left side of the box. The assist came from Désiré Doué, who provided a through ball.
Nuno Mendes from Paris Saint Germain won a free kick in defense.
Foul committed by Bukayo Saka of Arsenal.
João Neves from Paris Saint Germain won a free kick in defense.

Fabián Ruiz from Paris Saint Germain heads the ball from the center of the box, but it goes high and wide to the left.
Ousmane Dembélé of Paris Saint Germain misses a chance, shooting with his left foot from outside the box, sending the ball high and wide to the left. Marquinhos provided the assist.
The fourth official has indicated there will be 6 minutes of added time.
Missed chance. Désiré Doué from Paris Saint Germain shoots with his left foot from outside the box but it goes high. Assist by Vitinha.
Kai Havertz's left-footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Martin Ødegaard provided the assist with a through ball.
Corner awarded to Paris Saint Germain after Leandro Trossard concedes.

New attacking attempt. Fabián Ruiz of Paris Saint Germain takes a left-footed shot from a difficult position and long distance on the left, but it's saved by Arsenal's goalkeeper David Raya, who is positioned in the center of the goal. The assist comes from Vitinha.
Kai Havertz's header from the right side of the six-yard box is blocked. Declan Rice provided the assist.
Arsenal win a corner after Willian Pacho concedes.
The first half ends with Paris Saint Germain 0, Arsenal 1.

Penalty shootout begins after the match finishes 1-1.

Goal in the penalty shootout! Gonçalo Ramos scores for Paris Saint Germain with a right-footed shot into the top right corner. The match remains 1-1, and Paris Saint Germain now have 1 penalty scored.
Goal in the penalty shootout! Viktor Gyökeres scores for Arsenal with a right-footed shot into the right corner. The match remains 1-1, and Arsenal now have 1 penalty scored.
Goal in the penalty shootout! Désiré Doué scores for Paris Saint Germain with a right-footed shot into the right corner. The match remains 1-1, and Paris Saint Germain now have 2 penalties scored.
Penalty missed. Eberechi Eze for Arsenal takes a right-footed shot that goes close but misses to the left.
Penalty saved! Nuno Mendes of Paris Saint Germain had his left-footed shot saved in the right corner by David Raya of Arsenal.
Goal in the penalty shootout! Declan Rice scores for Arsenal with a right-footed shot into the right corner. The match remains 1-1, and Arsenal now have 2 penalties scored.
Goal in the penalty shootout! Achraf Hakimi scores for Paris Saint Germain with a right-footed shot into the left corner. The match remains 1-1, and Paris Saint Germain now have 3 penalties scored.
Goal in the penalty shootout! Gabriel Martinelli scores for Arsenal with a right-footed shot into the top left corner. The match remains 1-1, and Arsenal now have 3 penalties scored.
Goal in the penalty shootout! Beraldo scores for Paris Saint Germain with a left-footed shot into the right corner. The match remains 1-1, and Paris Saint Germain now have 4 penalties scored.
Penalty missed! Gabriel Magalhães from Arsenal shoots with his left foot but it goes over the bar.
Penalty shootout ends with Paris Saint Germain winning 4-3 on penalties after a 1-1 draw.
